subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou Who art my God and the God of the throneabove and of earth below, Who art the Desire of all men! I beseech Thee by the rains of the clouds of Thy mercy
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی و اله العرش و الثری و مقصود الوری اسئلک بامطار سحاب رحمتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @prayer for protection, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
